provenance.notes: Processed 10 quotes from 9 verse files. Source: HistoricalChristianFaith/Commentaries-Database. License: PUBLIC DOMAIN.

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: By Christ, he says, and not simply by God. But if through Jesus Christ God had this knowledge revealed, it is clear that it was through the Spirit, that is, because through Christ the grace of the activity of the Spirit descends to us.

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: before his throne. Now the seven spirits indicate the activity of the life-giving Spirit which directed Christ, God who was made man for us.

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: first begotten of the dead. Because he is not like those who died previously and rose and died again; but he is eternally immortal in the body which died.

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: So at the end of this section glory is befitting to Him who brought us to this honor and created so much grace. For we have nothing else to give in exchange, except only glory.

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: made us a kingdom: He made us kings through hope according to the undying promise, because if we endure we shall reign with Him.

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: and priests. in that we continually offer to Him the rational sacrifice of thanksgiving and blessing, heeding the advice, ‘Offer to God a sacrifice of blessing’ instead of irrational sacrifices:

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: bound. Satan was then bound when he was mocked on the Cross, and mankind received authority from Christ to walk on that same serpent as on one bound, those whom he was unable to harm.

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: Like wild beasts from their lairs, so these also will be released over the earth from their places through the Devil their general, so that they may destroy the camps of the saints-that is, the Church- which have been established in the four extremities of the world; unaware that not one angel but many are those that surround the fearers of God, as the Psalm says, “Camps of angels of the Lord surround his fearers and guard them.” Ps 33:8 Straightaway they will also lay hands on the holy city Jerusalem; whence the divine law was spread throughout the whole world by the apostles, and where too we have learned from the Apostle that Antichrist sits in the temple. 2Thess 2:4

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: in the right hand. Now in his right hand, that is, within his power and knowledge, all mystery of the Deity was enclosed in the books of the prophets. For the Lord does nothing which he does not reveal to his servants the prophets.

data.author: Nerses of Lambron
data.quote: All wept who were lost in ignorance, men and those from the orders of the most pure and angelic ranks.
